title: oSzoukaua's: Bee Small
description:
A Datapack/mod that can make Bees smaller!
(or set a custom default scale!)
body:
# Description: This **Datapack/mod** changes the size of Bees! Making them much smaller, cuter, and fitting! ^-^ Bee sizes are reduced by about 80% making them fit in much more, and clsoer to real sizes!

Since version **1.2** you can set a custom scale for bees through the command: **/data modify storage oszu_bs scale set value xx.xx** Replacing **xx.xx** with your desired scale, such as **1.5**, which would make the bees **150%** larger than vanilla default



## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
